allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/students -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOjEsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MjcyODAwNywiZXhwIjoxNzgyODE0NDA3fQ.uA3cJfZ92v6l4LvUXgnP2v7CVhu_VY0rvbW5DMtIXEU' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name_en":"Test Student","name_bn":"পরীক্ষা ছাত্র","class_id":1,"roll_number":99,"student_id":"SQA001"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/exams -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOjEsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MjcyODAwNywiZXhwIjoxNzgyODE0NDA3fQ.uA3cJfZ92v6l4LvUXgnP2v7CVhu_VY0rvbW5DMtIXEU' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"exam_name":"SQA Test Exam","exam_type":"midterm","class_id":1,"start_date":"2026-07-01","end_date":"2026-07-05","total_marks":100,"pass_marks":40}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/teachers -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOjEsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MjcyODAwNywiZXhwIjoxNzgyODE0NDA3fQ.uA3cJfZ92v6l4LvUXgnP2v7CVhu_VY0rvbW5DMtIXEU' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name_en":"SQA Teacher","teacher_id":"T-SQA"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('First teacher:', d[0] if d else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Exams: {len\(d\)}, first: {d[0][\\"exam_name\\"] if d else None}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), d[:1] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Classes: {len\(d\)}, names: {[\(c[\\"class_name\\"],c[\\"section\\"]\) for c in d]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Student results:', len\(d\), d[:1]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('linkedId:', d.get\('linkedId'\), 'linkedData:', d.get\('linkedData'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('role:', d.get\('role'\), 'linkedId:', d.get\('linkedId'\), 'name:', d.get\('linkedData', {}\).get\('name_en'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('role:', d.get\('role'\), 'linkedId:', d.get\('linkedId'\), 'teacher:', d.get\('linkedData'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c\) for c in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(c['class_name'], c['section'], '→', c['student_count'], 'students'\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('token','NO_TOKEN'\)[:50] if 'token' in d else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('role:', d['role'], '| permissions:', d.get\('permissions','MISSING'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Login OK, role:', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('role'\), 'perms:', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('permissions'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);[print\(f'  {c[\\"id\\"]:2}. {c[\\"class_name\\"]} {c[\\"section\\"]}'\) for c in sorted\(d, key=lambda x: x['id']\)]")
